hero.tagline: Unveil the Mysteries of Your Path ✨🔮
hero.line1: Replies within 24 hours | Audio or video sessions
hero.line2: Personalized tarot readings for love, career, purpose, and self-knowledge.

steps.title: Choose your service

about.title: About
about.body: Aurum Mística is a space for authentic spiritual consultations, where each reading is offered with dedication, respect, and depth. We use traditional tarot and channeling methods to bring clear, transformative guidance for your path.
about.quote: The universe speaks through the cards. It is up to us to listen with an open heart.

socialProof.title: What Our
socialProof.subtitle: Real testimonials from people who transformed their path

items.name: Ana M.
items.text: I was amazed by the accuracy of the reading. Every card resonated with my life right now. It helped me make a decision I had been putting off for months.

items.name: João S.
items.text: The live session was transformative. The cards brought clarity about my relationship and what I needed to change. Highly recommend!

items.name: Carla R.
items.text: I've had several consultations and I'm always surprised. Aurum Mística has a special gift for channeling the right messages at the right time.

items.name: Pedro L.
items.text: I was going through a hard time in my career. The reading showed paths I couldn't see. Within weeks, things started to shift.

items.q: How does the audio consultation work?
items.a: You send your question via WhatsApp and receive a detailed audio reply with the card interpretation within 24 hours.

items.q: Can I ask about any topic?
items.a: Yes! Love, career, finances, spiritual health, important decisions—the cards offer guidance for any area of your life.

items.q: What is the difference between the decks?
items.a: Each deck brings a different perspective. The more decks used, the more layers and detail the reading reveals about your situation.

items.q: How long until I get my answer?
items.a: Audio consultations are delivered within 24 hours. Live sessions are scheduled according to availability.
Yes, 100%. Everything you share is treated with full discretion and respect.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Pix, bank transfer, and credit cards.

finalCta.title: Ready to discover
finalCta.body: Your transformation starts with one question. The cards already hold the answer.

footer.tagline: Unveil the mysteries of your path ✨
footer.disclaimer: Sessions are spiritual and energetic in nature and do not replace medical, psychological, or financial treatment.

whatsappHelper.tiktokTitle: How to open WhatsApp from TikTok
whatsappHelper.tiktokStep1: Tap ⋯ (three dots) in the corner of the screen.
whatsappHelper.tiktokStep3: Return to this site and use the Open WhatsApp button below, or paste the number you copied.
whatsappHelper.openLink: Open WhatsApp (works best in an external browser)
